fixture.source_domain: formatting, sanitization, escaping, and text helpers

native_boundaries.reason: wp_check_invalid_utf8() reaches is_utf8_charset(), which reads get_option('blog_charset'); the probe seeds the native object cache with UTF-8.
esc_html, esc_url, sanitize_text_field, sanitize_key, and related functions expose apply_filters() hooks that must remain native PHP callbacks.
esc_url() delegates protocol validation through KSES helpers and wp_allowed_protocols().

remaining_gaps.detail: The candidate side is a copied WordPress oracle source tree until selected pure helpers move to Haxe parity candidates.
This fixture covers seed cases. Full formatting PHPUnit parity remains a domain-level closure requirement.
